creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Thierry Is quarterly affected by this build issue? If so, please re-open, and close setting merge-quarterly + post merge, thanks!

Note also that ports should not build with -Werror (ports compliance), should be able to override this with CFLAGS+=-Wno-error or if the port has a ./configure style argument, use that in CONFIGURE_ARGS
